title: Inspection reform: Education Secretary responds to Ofsted HMCI
body: "Bridget Phillipson responds to Sir Martyn Oliver about Ofsted’s consultation  response on proposed changes to education inspections being published in September 2025.  This letter  confirms:   we will publish our school accountability reforms consultation response in September 2025 the appointment of a new chair for Ofsted   Read Ofsted’s letter.  "

taxons.title: Inspections and performance of education providers
